Variables.Name: LinearDampingOverride
Variables.Description: Overridden linear damping value. The default is 0.7. Values below 0.7 won't have an effect.

Variables.Name: AngularDampingOverride
Variables.Description: Overridden angular damping value. The default is 0.7. Values below 0.7 won't have an effect.

Variables.Name: RelativeSpaceBone
Variables.Description: When in BoneRelative sim space, the simulation will use this bone as the origin

Variables.Name: BoundBone
Variables.Description: The bone to attach the physics body to, if bChain is true this is the top of the chain

Variables.Name: ChainEnd
Variables.Description: If bChain is true this is the bottom of the chain, otherwise ignored

Variables.Name: GravityScale
Variables.Description: Scale for gravity, higher values increase forces due to gravity

Variables.Name: GravityOverride
Variables.Description: Gravity Override Value

Variables.Name: LinearSpringConstant
Variables.Description:
Spring constant to use when calculating linear springs, higher values mean a stronger spring.
	  You need to enable the Linear Spring checkbox for this to have an effect.

Variables.Name: AngularSpringConstant
Variables.Description:
Spring constant to use when calculating angular springs, higher values mean a stronger spring.
	  You need to enable the Angular Spring checkbox for this to have an effect.
	  Note: Make sure to also set the Angular Target Axis and Angular Target in the Constraint Setup for this to have an effect.

Variables.Name: WindScale
Variables.Description: Scale to apply to calculated wind velocities in the solver

Variables.Name: ComponentLinearAccScale
Variables.Description: When using non-world-space sim, this controls how much of the components world-space acceleration is passed on to the local-space simulation.

Variables.Name: ComponentLinearVelScale
Variables.Description: When using non-world-space sim, this applies a 'drag' to the bodies in the local space simulation, based on the components world-space velocity.

Variables.Name: ComponentAppliedLinearAccClamp
Variables.Description: When using non-world-space sim, this is an overall clamp on acceleration derived from ComponentLinearAccScale and ComponentLinearVelScale, to ensure it is not too large.

Variables.Name: AngularBiasOverride
Variables.Description:
Overridden angular bias value
	   Angular bias is essentially a twist reduction for chain forces and defaults to a value to keep chains stability
	  in check. When using single-body systems sometimes angular forces will look like they are "catching-up" with
	  the mesh, if that's the case override this and push it towards 1.0f until it settles correctly

Variables.Name: NumSolverIterationsPreUpdate
Variables.Description: Number of update passes on the linear and angular limits before we solve the position of the bodies recommended to be four times the value of NumSolverIterationsPostUpdate

Variables.Name: NumSolverIterationsPostUpdate
Variables.Description: Number of update passes on the linear and angular limits after we solve the position of the bodies, recommended to be around a quarter of NumSolverIterationsPreUpdate

Variables.Name: SphericalLimits
Variables.Description: List of available spherical limits for this node

Variables.Name: ExternalForce
Variables.Description: An external force to apply to all bodies in the simulation when ticked, specified in world space

Variables.Name: PlanarLimits
Variables.Description: List of available planar limits for this node

Variables.Name: SimulationSpace
Variables.Description: The space used to run the simulation

Variables.Name: bUseSphericalLimits
Variables.Description: Whether to evaluate spherical limits

Variables.Name: bUsePlanarLimit
Variables.Description: Whether to evaluate planar limits

Variables.Name: bDoUpdate
Variables.Description: If true we will perform physics update, otherwise skip - allows visualization of the initial state of the bodies

Variables.Name: bDoEval
Variables.Description: If true we will perform bone transform evaluation, otherwise skip - allows visualization of the initial anim state compared to the physics sim

Variables.Name: bOverrideLinearDamping
Variables.Description: If true, the override value will be used for linear damping

Variables.Name: bOverrideAngularBias
Variables.Description:
If true, the override value will be used for the angular bias for bodies in this node. 
	   Angular bias is essentially a twist reduction for chain forces and defaults to a value to keep chains stability
	   in check. When using single-body systems sometimes angular forces will look like they are "catching-up" with
	   the mesh, if that's the case override this and push it towards 1.0f until it settles correctly

Variables.Name: bOverrideAngularDamping
Variables.Description: If true, the override value will be used for angular damping

Variables.Name: bEnableWind
Variables.Description: Whether or not wind is enabled for the bodies in this simulation

Variables.Name: bUseGravityOverride
Variables.Description: Use gravity override value vs gravity scale

Variables.Name: bGravityOverrideInSimSpace
Variables.Description: If true the gravity override value is defined in simulation space, by default it is in world space

Variables.Name: bLinearSpring
Variables.Description: If true the body will attempt to spring back to its initial position

Variables.Name: bAngularSpring
Variables.Description: If true the body will attempt to align itself with the specified angular target

Variables.Name: bChain
Variables.Description: Set to true to use the solver to simulate a connected chain
